steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content:
Sentence 1: rings outside the Roche limit are expected to accrete into a satellite.
Sentence 2: Morgado's team detected a ring well outside the Roche limit that has remained intact — contrary to expectation.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Though signals contrast — the observation defies the prediction.

Likewise (similarity), for example (illustration), and fittingly (in line with expectation) all imply agreement with Sentence 1, not contradiction.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
